_comment: 插件市场专属策展源（运营者维护）。插件身份展示字段 displayNamespace/displayNameKey/descriptionKey/iconToken/colorToken/displayName/summary 由 source plugin.properties 的 pixiv.* 和 i18n bundle 派生；安装关键字段（version/packageUrl/sha256/size/requiredCoreApi）由 generate-market-manifest.ps1 从真实产物推导。键为 pluginId。

description.zh: 官方必需插件，提供基础插画下载工作流、下载队列、批量状态、Pixiv 代理入口、下载页静态资源、油猴脚本分发与计划下载宿主。缺失时核心壳进入恢复 / 补齐模式。
description.en: Official required plugin providing the basic illustration download workflow, queue, batch state, Pixiv proxy endpoints, workbench static assets, userscript distribution, and scheduled download host. When missing, the core shell enters recovery/repair mode.

download-workbench.author: Sywyar
changeNotes: 下载工作台从核心壳外置为官方必需插件

description.zh: 为桌面 GUI 提供跟随系统、浅色、深色与 Moonlight 主题，并在完整重启后应用启动期主题。
description.en: Adds system, light, dark, and Moonlight themes to the desktop GUI, applied during startup after a full restart.

description.zh: 按作者 / 标签 / 时间维度汇总下载量的统计仪表盘（管理员专属）。
description.en: Admin-only dashboard aggregating downloads by author / tag / time.

description.zh: 基于核心图片 Hash 索引查找疑似重复作品，提供管理员专属分组页面、手动扫描与维护回填入口。
description.en: Finds likely duplicate artworks from the core image hash index, with an admin-only grouping page, manual scan, and maintenance backfill entry.

description.zh: 提供本地画廊、作品详情、精选集与系列页面，基于核心下载事实和 Pixiv 元数据展示历史作品。
description.en: Provides the local gallery, artwork detail, showcase, and series pages backed by core download facts and Pixiv metadata.

description.zh: 提供小说下载、Pixiv 小说 API、计划任务小说执行、翻译、合订、AI 听书协作、小说画廊与阅读页。
description.en: Provides novel downloading, Pixiv novel APIs, scheduled novel execution, translation, merge, AI narration collaboration, the novel gallery, and the reader page.

novel.author: Sywyar
changeNotes: 合并小说下载核心与小说展示层为官方可选插件

description.zh: 提供通知场景开关和中性通知级别文案，不发送邮件或推送；邮件与推送插件依赖它共享通知语义。
description.en: Provides notification scenario toggles and neutral severity labels without sending mail or push messages; mail and push plugins depend on it for shared notification semantics.

description.zh: 提供 Webhook、Telegram、Server 酱、PushPlus、企业微信、飞书、钉钉、Bark 等推送渠道。
description.en: Adds Webhook, Telegram, ServerChan, PushPlus, WeCom, Feishu, DingTalk, and Bark push channels.

description.zh: 提供 SMTP 邮件通知发送、服务商预设、测试邮件与计划任务通知模板。
description.en: Adds SMTP mail delivery, provider presets, test mail, and scheduled-task notification templates.

description.zh: 提供 Edge TTS 听书入口，以及 VoxCPM、MiMo、CosyVoice、Fish Audio、MiniMax、ElevenLabs、Qwen、Doubao 等朗读引擎。
description.en: Adds the Edge TTS listening entry and narration engines including VoxCPM, MiMo, CosyVoice, Fish Audio, MiniMax, ElevenLabs, Qwen, and Doubao.

description.zh: 提供 OpenAI 兼容模型调用、连接测试、小说自动翻译、系列翻译与听书剧本分析的 AI 能力。
description.en: Adds OpenAI-compatible model calls, connectivity tests, novel auto-translation, series translation, and AI narration analysis.
